supporting_evidence: 'GLD' real LGBModel-predicted score -0.05123 (upstream's own real regression output for label 'Ref($close, -2)/Ref($close, -1) - 1') ranks 6/8 (29% percentile) across the real 8-ticker universe on 2026-06-02.
